likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fish section.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fish section.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.

phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese municipal markets organize fresh produce into clearly signed sections for efficient shopping.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach upper floor restaurant
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao restaurante do piso superior?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional market restaurants are usually located on upper floors, accessed via central staircases.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o restaurante.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the restaurant.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the restaurant.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o restaurante.

phrases.cultural_note: The Peixaria is always on the ground floor in Portuguese markets.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o restaurante do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?

likely_response.local: O restaurante fica no piso superior. Pode subir as escadas perto da peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih FEE-kuh NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR. PAW-dih soo-BEER UHSH SHKAH-duhsh PEHR-too DUH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: The restaurant is on the upper floor. You can go up the stairs near the fish section.

responses.english: The restaurant is on the upper floor. You can go up the stairs near the fish section.
responses.phonetic: AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih FEE-kuh NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR. PAW-dih soo-BEER UHSH SHKAH-duhsh PEHR-too DUH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.local: O restaurante fica no piso superior. Pode subir as escadas perto da peixaria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Banca de flores is located
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a banca de flores?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH BAHNNG-kuh DIH FLOH-rihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Flower vendors are typically placed near main entrances to welcome visitors and brighten the space.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a banca de flores.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BAHNNG-kuh DIH FLOH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the flower stall.
